name: Brewmie: ukulungisa i-espresso
subtitle: Isikhathi sokugaya nokucwila
short_description: Isikhathi se-espresso, ilogi yokugaya, umqeqeshi. Yenziwe ngama-barista.
promotional_text: Yeka ukuqagela kumshini wokugaya. Khipha i-shot, linganisa ukunambitheka, i-Brewmie itshele ukuthi ushintshe ini. Yenziwe ngama-barista.
description:
Umqeqeshi wokulungisa i-espresso wama-barista asekhaya.

Yeka ukuqagela kumshini wokugaya. Khipha i-shot eyodwa, tshela i-Brewmie ukuthi inambitheke kanjani, futhi uthole isinyathelo esisodwa esicacile sokulandelayo. Ukugaya, idose noma i-yield, ngamayunithi angempela omshini wakho wokugaya, nesizathu ngezansi.

Yenziwe ngama-barista. Ihlelelwe imishini yakho, ubhontshisi nomoya wasekhishini lakho.

OKWENZAYO
Misa i-shot. Cindezela i-BREW. Isikhathi sithatha. Mema uma kuphelile. Linganisa i-crema nokunambitheka. Okusele i-Brewmie ikwenze.

OKWAZIWA YI-BREWMIE
Ngaphezu kwamamaki ayi-25 wemishini namamodeli ayi-100 wokugaya, namabanga okulungisa angempela. Ingcindezi ye-tamper, ubudala bobhontshisi, izinga lokugazinga, izinga lokushisa lekamelo, umswakama, konke kuthathwa kalula. Amaphrofayili ebhontshisi ahamba nawe kusuka esikhwameni ukuya kwesinye.

ULAYINI OWODWA, ISINYATHELO ESISODWA
Akukho "cishe ncane." Ukugaya kusuka ku-31.5 kuya ku-30.5, isizathu ngezansi nje. Sebenzisa ku-shot elandelayo ngokuthinta okukodwa.

INSIGHTS
Wonke ama-shot alandelelwa. Irekhodi lakho, isikolo sokuvumelana, isivinini sale sonto. Amaresiphi e-sweet spot avela uma ubhalise abaningi abahle. Khipha ilogi noma nini.

PREMIUM
Inkokhelo eyodwa ivula yonke imishini yokugaya, wonke ama-tamper, amaphrofayili agcwele ebhontshisi, ukukhipha kwe-CSV nokuvumelanisa kwasekhaya.

UBUMFIHLO
Ama-shot ahlala kudivayisi yakho ngokuzenzakalelayo. Ngena ukuze uvumelanise phakathi kwamafoni. Idatha ye-shot engaziwa idla i-algorithm. Vala noma nini.

Wenzelwa ama-barista akhathele ukuqagela.
whats_new: Ukukhishwa kokuqala. Khipha i-shot, bhala isikhathi ne-yield, linganisa ukunambitheka. I-Brewmie itshele ukuthi ushintshe ini, ngamayunithi angempela omshini wakho wokugaya.
